creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to John Marino from comment #8)
> i think the port needs a name change, otherwise I'm okay with it.
> 
> This is essentially a forked project, not the -devel version of rxvt.

You know, I struggled with that myself. But wasn't sure.
Thanks for making it easier to decide. :)

Before I embark on the name change. I want to confirm you're
good with my choice -- xvt. It was the original name, 20yrs.
ago, and hasn't been used since 1997. So if you respond with
affirmative. I'll make the changes, and resubmit anew.

Thanks, John.

--Chris
